Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by For the Record (10:04am-10:22am) (505)

Vladie P. Viltman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jerry E. Grooms an individual.
No appearance by defaulted defendants All Persons Unknown Claiming an Interest in the Property; Henry B. Seiler; Stephen Nelson Seiler; Ronald Hartman an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Witness Jerry Grooms sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s). the subject property is deemed to be vested solely in the name of Jerry E. Grooms, as a single person, per Text judgment signed in open court.
